Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Grandmaster Avernus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Grandmaster Avernus is a severe-looking woman with straight silver hair and a banner featuring a fan of four feathers on a brown-and-white background.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Grandmaster Avernus is a tall, refined woman with feathers in her silver hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Grandmaster Avernus reported that a Valinhall Traveler threw Grandmaster Asphodel's head in a sack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Grandmaster Avernus has long gray hair and was attending a meeting in casual robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Grandmaster Avernus was apologetic about Alin being left out of the decision-making process.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Grandmaster Avernus has an owl on one shoulder and a raven on the other.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Grandmaster Avernus claimed they would find Heir Talos in the Damascan camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Indirial has met Grandmaster Avernus before.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — A Grandmaster Avernus once predicted Alin would free the Incarnations.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
